bg2restocker.gui.mode.network.tooltip: Crafted materials stay in the ME network. Click to switch to exporting into an adjacent inventory.
bg2restocker.gui.mode.export.tooltip: Materials are moved into an adjacent inventory (e.g. a chest), reserving them from other crafting jobs. Click to switch back to keeping them in the ME network.
bg2restocker.msg.no_template: The gadget has no copied blueprint
bg2restocker.msg.read_failed: Could not read the blueprint from the gadget
bg2restocker.msg.no_network: No ME network connection — check cables and power
